action_plan.cortex_prompt_hint: Scan actions first. If verify_now dominates, route verifier/specialist spend. If repair_sources or widen_sources dominate, allocate scouts/tool-builders before verification. If resolve_tension dominates, assign contradiction-resolution scouts.

shape_semantics.repair_sources: fragile evidence, failed evidence flags, or low source independence
shape_semantics.resolve_tension: contradictory strings with enough evidence to adjudicate
shape_semantics.verify_now: high trade-scream score and verifier readiness
shape_semantics.widen_scouts: novel cell needing independent scout replication
shape_semantics.widen_sources: novel/frontier cell with insufficient independent source families
